task_name: Shatby Endo-School Basic Laparoscopy Course - Multiple Tasks Overview

score_components.formula_applied: N/A - Instructional content, no individual performance to score

confidence_rationale: Video is instructional/documentary content showing course overview, setup, and group teaching. No individual trainee performance of timed FLS tasks is demonstrated. Cannot score as performance because there is no single task completion sequence or measurable time/penalty data. Content spans multiple FLS tasks (peg transfer, pattern cut, endoloop visible) in demonstration/educational format only.
cannot_determine: Individual task completion - no single task performed from start to finish
Completion time - instructional montage, not a timed performance
Penalties - educational setup, not evaluated performance
Specific task_id - multiple tasks shown in overview format
technique_summary: This is an instructional documentary video produced by Shatby Endo-School showing the Basic Laparoscopy Course curriculum, equipment, instructors, and trainees. It is NOT a performance video of an individual trainee completing an FLS task. The video includes course introduction, instructor presentations, classroom instruction, trainer setups for multiple tasks, and hands-on group learning in a clinical setting.

demonstrated_techniques: Trainer setup for multiple FLS tasks (peg transfer, pattern cut, endoloop)
Proper institutional training environment with oversight
Group-based hands-on learning in clinical setting
verbal_cues: Documentation of course structure and learning objectives

improvement_suggestions: To score this content, individual trainee performance videos of specific FLS tasks are required
Videos must show complete task execution from start to finish with timestamp and performance metrics
